name: evostock-lab
description: Gmail-backed, scheduled portfolio research with auditable memory and gated rule evolution.

interface.longDescription: Deploy a local scheduled portfolio-research loop that rebuilds holdings from verified broker emails, records every decision, settles outcomes without future leakage, and promotes rules only after evidence and user approval.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Gmail-backed EvoStock automation.
Review which learned rules are eligible for approval.
